series_metadata.series_description: Public and private agency licensing records, including items necessary to determine agency compliance with licensing rules. Forms may include: JFS 01200,01268, 01270, 01271, 01276, 01282, 01283, 01290, 01324, 01327, 01330, 01339, 01340, 01342, 01344,01345, 01346, 01358,01359, 01376, 01377, 01390, 01391, 01392, 03326, 03327, 03328, 03329. Included also will be copies of child welfare agency written policies, approvals, financial audits, tables of organization, position descriptions, corrective action plans, articles of incorporation, BCI and FBI results and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Paper: in office and 4 years in records center
